# Mel Pino (SAMPLE)

> SAMPLE -- Mel Pino teaches firearms law, concealed-carry certification,
> and shooting technique in Clearwater, Florida. This summary is
> placeholder content; see docs/design/10-seo-and-content.md.

## Pages

- Home (SAMPLE): overview and primary booking call to action.
- Courses (SAMPLE): concealed-carry certification, group technique
  classes, private 1:1 instruction.
- About (SAMPLE): instructor bio and credentials.
- Contact (SAMPLE): phone and email.

## Notes for agents

- All content on this site is currently SAMPLE placeholder data pending
  real business information from the site owner.
- `/admin/*` is an authenticated, non-public application surface --
  disallowed in robots.txt.
